steps.title: Identify the triangle type
steps.content: Both acute angles are 45°, and there is a right angle (marked by the square). This is a 45-45-90 special right triangle.

steps.title: Apply the 45-45-90 property
steps.content: In a 45-45-90 triangle, the two legs are congruent. The vertical leg measures 24, so the horizontal leg is also 24. Therefore $x = 24$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
